## Summary

Describe the feature request briefly.

## Use case

What real workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## User value

How would this help users in source mode and/or packaged mode?

## Possible risks or trade-offs

What could this break, complicate, or make less reliable?

## Proposed approach (optional)

If you have an idea for implementation, share it here.
